mushin-squidley-v2.name: Mushin Squidley V2
mushin-squidley-v2.notes: Primary target. Squidley V2 with hardened gateway, structured receipts, Velum privacy layer, and multi-model routing. Reachable over Tailscale.

zenpop-squidley-v1.name: Zen Pop Squidley V1
zenpop-squidley-v1.notes: Secondary target. Original Squidley V1 instance for regression comparison. May not always be running.
